transcript.text:
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need] We captured all the chickens in the area
[Run away!]
[Tzuyang is here at BBQ Chicken to eat all the chickens!]
[Fried in golden oil]
Crazy sounds that stimulate the 5 senses
[BBQ Chicken (brand) Mukbang]
[Can't resist fried chicken]
Meat juice That juiciness
[With Manchego cheese sauce]
Subscribe and like!
Let's go to 6 mil
[This is located in Icheon, Gyeonggi-do]
[Chicken University...?]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Chicken University
It looks like a real school

It's big
Hello~!
[A warm welcoming]
Hello
Since you're here at Chicken University,
We captured all the chickens in the area
It's not a real school, right?
The Chicken University is a place for
prospective franchisees that want to start a business
It's a place for entrepreneurship education
Have you made fried chicken before?
Make it, eat it
And repeat
[Don't need to worry about running out of chicken]
[Let's make it]
This is awkward

-You're so tall -Right
I'm often referred to as Hyun Joo Yup here (ex-basketball player)
I'm 193cm
But maybe 2m 30cm with the hat
I hope it's not too uncomfortable for you
Do you enjoy eating BBQ Chicken?
I love the Golden Olive and the Jamaica
I will be teaching you our representative menu item: Golden Olive Chicken
Our chicken, in general, are fairly big
Crispy on the outside, soft on the inside
[Let's get started]
[1) 1 scoop of batter]
[2) Mix it up]
You're doing a good job
-It's very simple -Right?
-We're already about 60% done -Already?

[3. Bread the chicken]
What makes the Golden Olive chicken unique in appearance?
The breading is like flowers
Yes, the breading is curled up like a flower
As if the flower is about to bloom
You must do this with care with not too much force
How many fried chickens do you usually eat?
I've had 5 fried chickens from BBQ in 1 seating
5? Wow...
The more you aggravate the chicken, the more delicious it will turn out
[Well, in that case...]
You must push it in so that it can bloom into flowers
[Starting to bloom]
That color!
They're big
So it's hard for 1 person to eat the whole chicken

[Ready]
'BBQ Chicken' is this year's Winter Olympics sponsor
It will be great to eat BBQ Chicken while you watch the Olympics
Go South Korea!
What should I start with?
Jamaica!
Looks delicious Bon appetit
How do they make this sauce?
It's not spicy, but it has a kick to it
It's more like a barbeque sauce
The meat is tender The drumstick is huge
I had BBQ Chicken a few days ago
This is my 3rd BBQ Chicken this month
I order this cheese sauce whenever I get the Golden Olive chicken
It's so good The combination is really good
I used this sauce for the King Crab mukbang

The meat is so juicy
Dip it in the sauce like this
The juiciness
Is no joke
This is crazy!
This is their beverage Sparking Lemon Pu'er Tea
Oops, it's carbonated
This looks like beer It's not beer!
[Although I'd like some...]
Seasoned
Soft!
[Golden Olive Seasoned Boneless Chicken]
Big pieces
It's sweet Seasoned chicken that everyone would enjoy
Shrimp stick
Filled with shrimp

Delicious!
Cheese balls
[A variety of different cheese balls]
Choco ball This is really good
Chocolate
Filled with chocolatey goodness
Let's try the sweet potato
Not bad!
Filled with sweet potato
It's not mousse It's different... What is this?
It's good
Chicken skin
This is a lot
This is the sauce
What kind of meat is this?
Chicken breast It's really good

Lots of Manchego cheese
It's still so good!
It's still crispy even if it's been sitting here for a while
I think this is the best
I always order this when I eat BBQ Chicken
This time...
I love wings
Dip it in here
The drumette
That sound... It's crazy
BBQ Chicken is the best
What's this?
It's long
It has yellow cheese It's sweet
Doesn't it feel good to watch the Olympics while eating fried chicken?
I enjoy it even if I don't know the rules

This is cream cheese
It would be a dream to eat at BBQ Chicken for free forever
That used to be my childhood dream
I really wanted that
There's a way to figure out which part of the meat the boneless are
Square, upright, and hard=chicken breast
It looks weird=leg
Shrimp stick is very long
The shrimp is meaty I love the texture
This sauce is just too good
There's a lot inside too
Drumstick Can I have another one?
It's the last drumstick
Have you seen a drumstick this big? It's the size of my arm
You see the jerk sauce? It's so good
Look at the size

It's a bat
The sauce
[With care]
You must try this sauce It's so good
[With the sweet & spicy sauce]
This should be good with Manchego sauce too
A lot of cheese
It's so tasty
It goes so well together
This is so good too
This is a must for dessert
For Jamaica chicken, it's never enough
It's that good
Manchego and fried chicken goes really well together
Going in
Skin

Saved the sweet potato cheese ball for a snack
Bon appetit
Let's go check out Chicken University now that I had my meal
[Back at Chicken University]
[Let me introduce you to my school]
-He's famous -Yes, he is the founder and chairman of BBQ Chicken
He is currently in China for the Beijing Olympics
It would've been very nice for you to meet him
Maybe he could have given you the "Eat Free for Life" pass
-Can I come back again next time? -Yes
-This over here is our fitness room -Fitness room?
We might get full from too much training
So people come here to work out if they need to
[A fitness facility available just like a real university!]
I will be showing you the dorm rooms trainees use
This is like a hotel

3rd, 4th, and 5th floors are all dorms
It's really nice
Wow
[All of a sudden?]
[So what?]
[Let's try it again together]
I'm not sure how this will turn out
[Next location]
Training room
Display of different fried chicken brands
[A lot of BBQ Chicken items too!]
What is your favorite food item from BBQ Chicken?
I like everything
[Heading further in]
[This is the practice room]
You would need to spend 10 days of training here at Chicken University

That's the reason why we are able to make delicious fried chickens
No wonder it tastes so good
That's the Golden Chicken
It has been made to wish us growth
Korea's #1 Master Craftsman Lee Jae Soon took 2 years to make this
-Magnificent, right? -Yes it is
I hope all of my subscribers receive the luck of the Golden Chicken With nothing but good things in the future
Fighting!
[BBQ Chicken and Tzuyang wish you good luck this year]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Seamul Child Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
